execution_summary: RR-002 remains blocked on real Windows runtime validation, so phase/bootstrap advanced OPS-012 by patching the docs-site dependency tree to remediate the four recorded Dependabot alerts locally. npm install failed under npm 11.12.1 / Node 25.9.0 with EBADF registry-fetch errors, so the remediation used direct tarball replacement, then validated the patched dependency graph with npm ls and a production Docusaurus build.
